text.message: I love this game so much
this is a bad spot to be last
Green getting played like a fiddle
who cares when theres no ore lol
if you trade a brick or wheat
This is such an odd way of playing
I can give my next wheat green as well
Its not a city i was trying to dev
This table talk from black is quite odd
Nice black. U gave a city!
So that doesnt apply to you right?
he does appear to be cracked in rank
you are too far ahead now
I cant hit green every time
the real reason he didn't rob green
But i was never gonna go for that initially
I just happened to have the cards
Plus u have 2 devs u havent used which worries me
And nobody has tested those devs yet
Ok what are your devs then?
if they're both vps, im tied with way less resources
But i doubt they are both vps. One surely a mono
you bullied last man it's fine
you might have road sometime in the future
U right but never a solo
U got anwy for no reason
I mean im out of it lol
U ruined the game for me because of what?
you were tied for the lead
I havent seen a worse played game here than red
guys dont forget blue might someday take road
I gave up on that u clown green
black aint out of it yet
not tracking my cards are ya
you don't want me to settle?
i keep resources for you, red
I’d rather green win at this point since black repeatadly stole me
I can leave it for him if yo uwant
why are you trying to get him to waste cards
i was out of settles, just fyi
